   "source": [
    "# 相関解析: 統計的手法\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/advanced_correlation.ipynb)\n",
    "\n",
    "gwexpyでは、TimeSeriesオブジェクト間の統計的相関を簡単に計算できます。これはノイズハンティングや非線形結合の調査に役立ちます。\n",
    "\n",
    "サポートされている手法:\n",
    "- **Pearson (PCC)**: 線形相関。\n",
    "- **Kendall (Ktau)**: 順位相関（外れ値に強く、ノンパラメトリック）。\n",
    "- **MIC**: Maximal Information Coefficient（非線形関係に対してロバスト、`minepy`が必要、`python scripts/install_minepy.py`で構築）。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "f78afc77",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:06:03.992531Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:06:03.992272Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:06:12.924710Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:06:12.923804Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 8.958811,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:06:12.928379+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:06:03.969568+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import sys\n",
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "# Ensure the root directory is in sys.path\n",
    "root = Path.cwd()\n",
    "while root.parent != root:\n",
    "    if (root / \"gwexpy\").exists():\n",
    "        if str(root) not in sys.path:\n",
    "            sys.path.insert(0, str(root))\n",
    "        break\n",
    "    root = root.parent\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.plot import PairPlot, Plot\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeries, TimeSeriesMatrix"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "69f4e322",
   "metadata": {

     "status": "completed"

    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## ペアごとの相関"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "b0199ad5",
   "metadata": {

   "source": [
    "# Create dummy data\n",
    "t = np.linspace(0, 10, 1000)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Linear relationship\n",
    "ts_a = TimeSeries(t, dt=0.01, name=\"A\")\n",
    "ts_b = TimeSeries(t * 2 + np.random.normal(0, 1, 1000), dt=0.01, name=\"B_Linear\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Nonlinear relationship (sine wave)\n",
    "ts_c = TimeSeries(np.sin(t) * 10, dt=0.01, name=\"C_Sine\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Random noise\n",
    "ts_d = TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 1, 1000), dt=0.01, name=\"D_Noise\")\n",
    "\n",
    "Plot(ts_a, ts_b, ts_c, ts_d, separate=True, sharex=True);"
   ]
  },

  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "9d05c9b1",
   "metadata": {

   "source": [
    "## 相関ベクトル (ノイズハンティング)\n",
    "\n",
    "ノイズ源を調査する際、ターゲットチャンネル（例：DARM）と数百の補助チャンネルとの間の相関を確認したいことがよくあります。\n",
    "`TimeSeriesMatrix.correlation_vector` はこのランキングを効率的に計算します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "03d4f20e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.602259Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.600781Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.618277Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.614317Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.044426,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.619102+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.574676+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Create a Matrix with many auxiliary channels\n",
    "n_channels = 20\n",
    "data = np.random.randn(n_channels, 1, 1000)\n",
    "names = [f\"AUX-{i:02d}\" for i in range(n_channels)]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Inject signals into AUX-05 and AUX-12\n",
    "target_signal = np.sin(np.linspace(0, 20, 1000))\n",
    "data[5, 0, :] += target_signal * 5  # Strong coupling\n",
    "data[12, 0, :] += target_signal**2 * 5  # Nonlinear coupling\n",
    "\n",
    "matrix = TimeSeriesMatrix(data, dt=0.01, channel_names=names)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Target channel\n",
    "target = TimeSeries(\n",
    "    target_signal + np.random.normal(0, 0.1, 1000), dt=0.01, name=\"TARGET\"\n",
    ")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "f8c765d2",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.676920Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.676344Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.694004Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.691860Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.047498,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.695284+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:50.647786+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Computing MIC vector (Top 5)...\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/markdown": [
       "\n",
       "    **Note**: Skipping MIC example because minepy is not installed.\n",
       "\n",
       "    "
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.Markdown object>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Compute correlation vector\n",
    "# Use 'mic' to capture both linear and nonlinear (slower but powerful)\n",
    "# Use 'pearson' for speed\n",
    "\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    print(\"Computing MIC vector (Top 5)...\")\n",
    "    df_mic = matrix.correlation_vector(target, method=\"mic\", parallel=2)\n",
    "    print(df_mic.head(5))\n",
    "except ImportError:\n",
    "    from IPython.display import Markdown, display\n",
    "    display(Markdown(\"\"\"\n",
    "    **Note**: Skipping MIC example because minepy is not installed.\n",
    "\n",
    "    \"\"\"))\n"
   ]
  },
  {

   "source": [
    "print(\"Computing Pearson vector (Top 5)...\")\n",
    "df_pcc = matrix.correlation_vector(target, method=\"pearson\", parallel=1)\n",

   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# Visualize ranking (Top 10)\n",
    "df_plot = df_pcc.head(10).iloc[::-1]  # Reverse to descending order\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
    "plt.barh(df_plot[\"channel\"], np.abs(df_plot[\"score\"]), color=\"skyblue\")\n",
    "plt.xlabel(\"Absolute Correlation Score (Pearson)\")\n",
    "plt.title(\"Top 10 Correlated Channels\")\n",
    "plt.grid(axis=\"x\", linestyle=\"--\", alpha=0.7)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "e6c6a3bd",
   "metadata": {

     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.650020+00:00",

   "source": [
    "## 偏相関（共通要因の除去）\n",
    "\n",
    "共通の要因を取り除いて、直接的な結びつきを評価します。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "818cdab3",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.706499Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.706119Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.729871Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.727176Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.054538,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.731203+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.676665+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "corr(x,y): 0.9809075921667307\n",
      "partial corr(x,y|z): 0.00441045286024793\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeries\n",
    "\n",
    "rng = np.random.default_rng(0)\n",
    "t = np.linspace(0, 10, 1000)\n",
    "z = np.sin(2 * np.pi * 0.5 * t) + 0.1 * rng.standard_normal(t.size)\n",
    "x = z + 0.1 * rng.standard_normal(t.size)\n",
    "y = z + 0.1 * rng.standard_normal(t.size)\n",
    "\n",
    "ts_x = TimeSeries(x, dt=t[1] - t[0], name=\"x\")\n",
    "ts_y = TimeSeries(y, dt=t[1] - t[0], name=\"y\")\n",
    "ts_z = TimeSeries(z, dt=t[1] - t[0], name=\"z\")\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"corr(x,y):\", ts_x.correlation(ts_y, method=\"pearson\"))\n",
    "print(\"partial corr(x,y|z):\", ts_x.partial_correlation(ts_y, controls=ts_z, method=\"residual\"))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3c21c92c",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.031837,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.838889+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.807052+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## Association Edges / グラフ化\n",
    "\n",
    "ターゲット時系列に対して行列の各チャンネルを評価し、エッジを作成します。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 12,
   "id": "c0aaa42e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.914224Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.913711Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.958017Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.954978Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.085178,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.960437+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:51.875259+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Association edges:\n",
      "    row  col channel     score source target\n",
      "0    0    0       x  1.000000      x      x\n",
      "1    2    0       z  0.989968      x      z\n",
      "2    1    0       y  0.980908      x      y\n",
      "Partial correlation matrix:\n",
      " [[1.         0.1216813  0.6444092 ]\n",
      " [0.1216813  1.         0.67131295]\n",
      " [0.6444092  0.67131295 1.        ]]\n",
      "Graph built successfully.\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from gwexpy.analysis import association_edges, build_graph\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeriesMatrix\n",
    "\n",
    "matrix = TimeSeriesMatrix(\n",
    "    np.stack([x, y, z], axis=0)[:, None, :],\n",
    "    dt=t[1] - t[0],\n",
    "    channel_names=[\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"],\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "edges = association_edges(ts_x, matrix, method=\"pearson\", topk=3)\n",
    "print(\"Association edges:\\n\", edges)\n",
    "\n",
    "pcorr = matrix.partial_correlation_matrix(shrinkage=\"auto\")\n",
    "print(\"Partial correlation matrix:\\n\", pcorr)\n",
    "\n",
    "# If networkx is available:\n",
    "graph = build_graph(edges, backend=\"none\")\n",
    "print(\"Graph built successfully.\")"
   ]
  },

    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "# Bar plot of top edges\n",
    "top = edges.sort_values('score', ascending=False, key=abs).head(10)\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(6, 3))\n",
    "plt.barh(top['target'], top['score'])\n",
    "plt.gca().invert_yaxis()\n",
    "plt.xlabel('score')\n",
    "plt.title('Top associations')\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Heatmap of partial correlation\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(4, 3))\n",
    "plt.imshow(pcorr, vmin=-1, vmax=1, cmap='coolwarm')\n",
    "plt.colorbar(mappable=plt.gca().get_images()[-1] if plt.gca().get_images() else plt.gca().collections[-1], label='partial corr')\n",
    "plt.title('Partial correlation matrix')\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]

   "source": [
    "## FastMI（実験的）\n",
    "\n",
    "FastMI は、copula（経験CDF）+ probit 変換 + FFT ベースの self-consistent 密度推定を用いた相互情報量 (MI) 推定です。\n",
    "\n",
    "- API: `TimeSeries.fastmi(other, grid_size=..., quantile=..., eps=...)` または `correlation(other, method=\"fastmi\")`\n",
    "- 出力: MI（**nats**、0以上）。値が大きいほど依存が強い（線形/非線形を問わない）。\n",
    "- パラメータ:\n",
    "  - `grid_size`: FFT グリッド分解能（精度と速度のトレードオフ）。\n",
    "  - `quantile`: probit の極端な裾をトリムして安定化。\n",
    "  - `eps`: `log(0)` 回避のための下限。\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 14,
   "id": "e1e3a05b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:07:53.234701Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:07:53.234422Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:07:53.297693Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:07:53.293865Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.089566,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:53.300471+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:53.210905+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "fastMI(x,y): 0.08925170168547956\n",
      "fastMI(x,z): 0.11320579203180092\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# fastMI (copula/probit + FFT-based MI estimator)\n",
    "# NOTE: this can be slower than Pearson for small n, but is useful for nonlinear dependence.\n",
    "print('fastMI(x,y):', ts_x.fastmi(ts_y, grid_size=128))\n",
    "print('fastMI(x,z):', ts_x.fastmi(ts_z, grid_size=128))\n"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# 高度な統計解析 (Advanced Statistics)\n",
    "\n",
    "gwexpyは、相関だけでなく、データの分布形状や因果関係を調べるための高度な統計機能も提供しています。\n",
    "\n",
    "- **Skewness (歪度)**: 分布の非対称性。\n",
    "- **Kurtosis (尖度)**: 分布の裾の重さ（外れ値の多さ）。\n",
    "- **Distance Correlation (dCor)**: 非線形な依存関係の尺度。\n",
    "- **Granger Causality**: 時系列間の因果関係（予測への寄与）。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d6d93a1c",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.022676,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:54.370713+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:54.348037+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 非ガウス性ノイズの検出 (Skewness / Kurtosis)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 16,
   "id": "42d69520",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:07:54.425178Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:07:54.424664Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.060609Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.056661Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 22.665057,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.062705+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:07:54.397648+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 1200x600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Gaussian:     Skewness=0.117, Kurtosis=0.066\n",
      "Non-Gaussian: Skewness=1.981, Kurtosis=5.379\n",
      "Note: Gaussian distributions have Skewness~0, Kurtosis~0 (Fisher definition).\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Generate Gaussian noise and non-Gaussian noise (exponential distribution)\n",
    "np.random.seed(42)\n",
    "gauss_noise = TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 1, 1000), dt=0.01, name=\"Gaussian\")\n",
    "exp_noise = TimeSeries(\n",
    "    np.random.exponential(1, 1000) - 1, dt=0.01, name=\"Non-Gaussian\"\n",
    ")  # Centered\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot\n",
    "plot = exp_noise.plot(label=\"Non-Gaussian\")\n",
    "plot.gca().plot(gauss_noise, label=\"Gaussian\", alpha=0.7)\n",
    "plot.gca().legend()\n",
    "plot.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Calculate statistics\n",
    "print(\n",
    "    f\"Gaussian:     Skewness={gauss_noise.skewness():.3f}, Kurtosis={gauss_noise.kurtosis():.3f}\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "print(\n",
    "    f\"Non-Gaussian: Skewness={exp_noise.skewness():.3f}, Kurtosis={exp_noise.kurtosis():.3f}\"\n",
    ")\n",
    "print(\"Note: Gaussian distributions have Skewness~0, Kurtosis~0 (Fisher definition).\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "dde68c71",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {

     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.189233+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [

    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 非線形依存性の検出 (Distance Correlation)\n",
    "\n",
    "先ほどの正弦波データ(`ts_c`)と線形データ(`ts_a`)の関係をdCorで見てみましょう。Pearson相関では捉えられなかった関係が検出できます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 17,
   "id": "5e3b25af",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.295526Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.294475Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.304226Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.301974Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.04236,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.310236+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.267876+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/markdown": [
       "\n",
       "    **Note**: dcor package is not installed. Install it with: pip install dcor\n",
       "\n",

      ],
      "text/plain": [

      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "try:\n",
    "    dcor_val = ts_a.distance_correlation(ts_c)\n",
    "    print(f\"Distance Correlation (A vs C): {dcor_val:.3f}\")\n",
    "    print(f\"Pearson Correlation  (A vs C): {ts_a.pcc(ts_c):.3f}\")\n",
    "except ImportError:\n",
    "    from IPython.display import Markdown, display\n",
    "    display(Markdown(\"\"\"\n",
    "    **Note**: dcor package is not installed. Install it with: pip install dcor\n",

    "    \"\"\"))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2e603d4f",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.030512,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.448866+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.418354+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 因果関係の推定 (Granger Causality)\n",
    "\n",
    "ある時系列の過去の値が、別の時系列の未来の値を予測するのに役立つかどうかを検定します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 18,
   "id": "8ba7a211",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.560548Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.560252Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.726636Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.725770Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.232061,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.736294+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.504233+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Granger Causality X -> Y (p-value): 0.0000 (Significant)\n",
      "Granger Causality Y -> X (p-value): 0.0907 \n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Generate data with causal relationship (X -> Y)\n",
    "np.random.seed(0)\n",
    "n = 200\n",
    "x_val = np.random.randn(n)\n",
    "y_val = np.zeros(n)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Y depends on the value of X one step before\n",
    "for i in range(1, n):\n",
    "    y_val[i] = 0.5 * y_val[i - 1] + 0.8 * x_val[i - 1] + 0.1 * np.random.randn()\n",
    "\n",
    "ts_x = TimeSeries(x_val, dt=1, name=\"Cause (X)\")\n",
    "ts_y = TimeSeries(y_val, dt=1, name=\"Effect (Y)\")\n",
    "\n",
    "try:\n",
    "    # Does X cause Y? (Does X help predict Y?) -> p-value should be small\n",
    "    p_xy = ts_y.granger_causality(ts_x, maxlag=5)\n",
    "    # Does Y cause X? -> p-value should be large\n",
    "    p_yx = ts_x.granger_causality(ts_y, maxlag=5)\n",
    "    print(\n",
    "        f\"Granger Causality X -> Y (p-value): {p_xy:.4f} {'(Significant)' if p_xy < 0.05 else ''}\"\n",
    "    )\n",
    "    print(\n",
    "        f\"Granger Causality Y -> X (p-value): {p_yx:.4f} {'(Significant)' if p_yx < 0.05 else ''}\"\n",
    "    )\n",
    "except ImportError:\n",
    "    from IPython.display import Markdown, display\n",
    "    display(Markdown(\"\"\"\n",
    "    **Note**: The statsmodels package is not installed. To perform Granger causality analysis:\n",
    "    ```bash\n",
    "    pip install statsmodels\n",
    "    ```\n",
    "    You can continue with the rest of the notebook.\n",
    "    \"\"\"))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ab8a1232",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.066979,
     "end_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:18.007987+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-26T09:08:17.941008+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 高速相互情報量推定 (fastmi)\n",
    "\n",
    "`fastmi` は、コピュラ（Copula）定式化、プロビット（Probit）変換、およびFFTベースの密度推定に基づく高速な相互情報量（Mutual Information）推定器です。Pearson相関が見逃す可能性のある複雑な非線形依存関係を捉えることができます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 19,
   "id": "d418e69b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-26T09:08:18.157849Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-26T09:08:18.157313Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-26T09:08:18.206487Z",

    "ts_y_aligned = ts_y.resample(ts_x.sample_rate.value)\n",
    "ts_z_aligned = ts_z.resample(ts_x.sample_rate.value)\n",
    "\n",
    "mi_xy = ts_x.fastmi(ts_y_aligned, grid_size=128)\n",
    "mi_xz = ts_x.fastmi(ts_z_aligned, grid_size=128)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"Mutual Information (x, y): {mi_xy:.4f} nats\")\n",
    "print(f\"Mutual Information (x, z): {mi_xz:.4f} nats\")"
